title: Delete Google
abstract:
OMG

i just had an older relative contact me because he wants to buy a retirement house in the country-side but google tells him all the places he searches are susceptible to flooding.

you see, if ONLY ONCE, it rained too hard in the last 50 years, wouldn't you know it, google knows it, and
abstract_zh: 喂喂，各位HN小伙伴们！你叔公想买个乡下养老房，结果谷歌告诉他那地方老爱淹水。天哪，就因为50年前有一次暴雨，这鬼谷歌记到现在！要是能删了它，说不定叔公就能找到理想家园啦！快用「Tell HN: Delete Google」吧，一键操作，告别烦人的搜索结果！
